examples: He never grew used to the lashings he got from the critics.
We made a tour of the yacht, checking lashings and emergency gear.
The sea was calm, the reef exposed, sky blue with lashings of pink.
On the other hand, the bases' presence brings lashings of central government money to the country's poorest prefecture.
When the Lewinsky story broke in January, the Speaker showed surprising restraint given his lashings during earlier Clinton scandals.
